title: The Lookout - Review - Capitol Hill - Seattle - The Infatuation
content: # The Lookout. Big GroupsDay DrinkingEating At The BarSitting Outside. The Lookout is a divey spot with good beer, decent fish and chips, and an excellent view from their outdoor deck. Bring a big group for some day drinking in the summer, and stick around to watch the sunset. We only rate spots where you can eat a full meal. We won’t rate a coffee shop, bar that only serves peanuts, or dessert shop. ### The Pine Box. The Pine Box is a bar in an old mortuary, and it’s great. Linda’s has a big back patio, taxidermy, arcade machines, and a fun crowd at all times. If you’re in Cap Hill, this is a mandatory bar crawl spot. ### Dino’s Tomato Pie. Dino’s is one of few places in Seattle that knows how to do grandma-style pizza. It’s one of our favorite spots on Capitol Hill for drinks and a late-night pie. Aimee launched The Infatuation Seattle in 2017.

title: The Lookout Bar & Grill - Best Capitol Hill Seattle Bar & Restaurant
content: # The Lookout Bar and Grill, Seattle. With skyline views, a welcoming neighborhood feel, and drinks that hold their own in the city’s thriving nightlife scene, The Lookout has earned its place among the best bars in Seattle - a go-to spot for locals and visitors looking to experience the city from a different perspective. Whether you’re stopping in before a night out or winding down with friends, there’s always something new to try. As one of the favourite Capitol Hill bars, we keep the good times going with specials worth raising a glass to. A couple of customers enjoying The Lookout Brunch. Big sandwich and a glass of beer. Best view in the city! The food was great, the drinks were great, the outdoor patio was great and the servers? Whether you’re pairing your meal with a bottomless mimosa or here for a dessert, our menu brings something for everyone.

title: THE LOOKOUT BAR AND GRILL - Restaurant Reviews - Yelp
content: we had bottomless mimosas for 17$ and totally worth it! the bar has board games and a beautiful patio with an amazing view of seattle! wouldn't recommend

title: The Lookout - All You SHOULD Know Before Going 2026 (with ...
content: This is in a suburb area with lots of homes....drive carefully and watch for one-way streets. Some streets are straight up or straight down they freaked me out!
